overview: A professional loan provider platform that guides customers through the complete loan application journey — from KYC verification and document uploads to CIBIL credit checks, processing fee payment, and admin-controlled approval and disbursement management.
features: Customer registration and login with KYC identity verification
Document uploads for identity proof, address proof, income proof, and bank statements
CIBIL credit score check and eligibility assessment
Loan application with amount, tenure, and purpose selection
Stripe payment gateway for processing fees
Customer dashboard showing real-time application status and approval details
Admin dashboard for reviewing applications, approving with custom loan amounts, and managing disbursements
Role-based access control for customers and admins
